query: Austin — my Promethean board won't turn on this morning. The screen is totally black and nothing happens when I press the button on the remote. I have a lesson in 20 minutes. — Julie Bauer, GIS 5th grade
forwarded from Kim: one of our staff members, Rachel, can't log into her GIS Google account — keeps saying incorrect password. She already tried resetting it herself and it's still not working
hey just got this from a gis teacher: 'Hi, I'm trying to print some handouts for class but the printer is just saying error, nothing comes out. I've tried twice already.' can you triage this
/helpdesk-triage
work this ticket — [TICKET #8472] Student at SJA can't access Google Classroom — getting 'permission denied' every time she tries to join a class. Teacher filed on her behalf.
a 2nd grade teacher at gis emailed saying her whole class can't get into IXL today, they just get a spinning wheel. been happening since this morning. sara meyerhoff.
got this from smeyerhoff@germanschool-mn.org — 'My projector keeps disconnecting from my laptop every 10 minutes or so. Using the HDMI cable. Really disruptive mid-lesson.' what do i do with this
triage this — a GIS parent forwarded a complaint that their kid's school Chromebook has a cracked screen. Kid dropped it on the bus. Device is a 2022 HP Chromebook, serial starts with 5CD.
Elizabeth forwarded something from a 4th grade teacher who says their classroom iPad cart won't charge — the whole cart, not just individual iPads. GIS, room 108. Class starts at 9.

new one just came in: the front office at SJA is saying their shared printer is offline and they can't print anything. been down since yesterday afternoon and they need to print enrollment forms today
can you draft a reply to the vendor email about the Epson projector quote for GIS room 114? They came back at $1,800 per unit and I want to push back a little
process my email
what does the KB say about chromebook repair policy? I want to read through the actual article before my call with Elizabeth
can you pull up the Freshdesk queue and show me all open tickets from this week, sorted by priority? I want to see what's in the backlog before I respond to anything
I need to set up a new VM on Proxmox for the SJA fileserver migration — 4 cores, 8GB RAM, Ubuntu 22.04. Can you do that via the MCP tools?
the GIS UniFi switch in the server room is showing high CPU in the dashboard — like 94% sustained. Can you check what's going on and whether we need to reboot it?
can you help me write a tech acceptable use policy doc for GIS covering chromebooks and personal devices? Elizabeth wants something she can send home to families.
gis ops meeting is tomorrow morning, can you prep the owners meeting doc? Jesse wants to go over the VOIP quote and the Raptor visitor system
I need to reset a password for a new client we just onboarded — it's a charter school in Wisconsin, not GIS or SJA. They use Google Workspace too. Their admin is locked out.
compress this session
